name: Ginger Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken wings into two pieces, discarding the tips or saving them for soup.
2. Grate or puree a generous amount of ginger root per pound of wings.
3. Combine with low-salt soy sauce; let marinate for several hours in the refrigerator or overnight.
4. When ready to cook, remove marinade and arrange on a baking sheet or grill rack.
5. Bake, broil, or grill until cooked through and skin is crispy.
These wings are quick to prepare—about 20 minutes—and can be made ahead of time. They freeze well for up to a day before cooking, or you can cook them in advance and refrigerate or freeze the leftovers for quick meals or unexpected guests. Not particularly spicy but very flavorful.
